name: node-concat-stream
title: node-concat-stream
description:
writable stream that concatenates strings
Node-concat-stream creates a writable stream that concatenates strings
or binary data and calls a callback with the result.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.

When validating lab setup, run `node-concat-stream --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
